testimonials.title: Trusted by creators shipping weekly
testimonials.author: Creator {index}
quotes: Cut my prep time in half and made posting windows obvious.
The report drawer + history flow is super clear and fast.
Talking-head outputs plus captions gave us a reliable content engine.

items.a: We analyze uploaded visuals and produce platform-focused plans, captions, hashtags, and posting windows.

items.q: Can I use it for multiple content styles?
items.a: Yes. Each upload can produce a different strategy and you can compare outputs from your history.

items.q: Do I need to enroll my face?
items.a: Yes, one-time enrollment is required per active package instance for security and access control.
Yes. Video generation is included by plan, with extra credits available as add-ons.

items.q: What happens when I reach quota limits?
items.a: You can upgrade plan capacity or purchase add-ons inside billing without changing your current setup.

items.q: Where can I review old outputs?
items.a: Your dashboard history keeps prior analyses and reports so you can reopen them at any time.

livePreview.title: See how Echofy turns content production into a system
livePreview.subtitle: Each block highlights a different part of the workflow: strategy, execution speed, and consistent avatar-ready delivery.

sections.title: Turn one upload into a repeatable strategy system.
sections.body: Get positioning angles, caption direction, and platform-specific priorities from a single input. Replace guesswork with a playbook your team can run every week.

sections.title: Move from idea to publish-ready output faster.
sections.body: Generate messaging options, posting direction, and execution-ready next steps in one focused flow built for creators and lean teams.

sections.title: Keep avatar and campaign output consistently on-brand.
sections.body: Connect insight-driven planning with avatar-ready content execution so your voice stays consistent across personas, campaigns, and channels.

security.title: Face enrollment and access control
security.enrollment: Face enrollment is required before usage and access remains locked until enrollment is complete.
security.quota: Enrollment does not consume your uploads quota; only actual content analysis uses quota.

faq.title: Plan questions answered
faq.planSpecificQuestion: Who is the {plan} plan best for?

planSpecific.lite: Lite is ideal for testing the workflow and shipping your first optimized outputs.
planSpecific.pro: Pro is ideal for weekly creators who need higher limits and priority processing.
planSpecific.ultimate: Ultimate is ideal for agencies and power users managing high-volume production.

items.a: Yes. You can move to a higher plan anytime without losing your existing history.
Add-ons apply to your account usage and follow your current billing rules.
Yes. Support level depends on your selected package tier.

aiChat.contextLimitBody: Start a new chat or summarize to continue this thread.

aiChat.suggestionsDescription: Suggestions for captions, hooks, strategy, and avatar scripts
aiChat.placeholderContextLimited: Context limit reached. Start a new chat or summarize.
aiChat.tokensUsage: Context Tokens: {used} of {limit} used in this conversation
aiChat.inputHint: Ask for captions, hooks, avatar scripts, or next-post strategy using your latest upload context.
aiChat.errorChatLimit: You've reached your plan's chat limit.
aiChat.errorRateLimit: You're sending messages too fast. Try again shortly.
aiChat.errorSendFailed: Something went wrong sending your message. Please try again.
aiChat.footerDescription: Your AI content strategy coach can help you go from idea to publish-ready output.
promptsStrategy: Based on my last upload, what 3 content angles should I double down on this week?
Turn my recent performance into a practical 7-day content strategy.
What should I stop posting right now, and what should I post instead?
promptsCaptions: Write 5 premium caption variations for my next post: bold, flirty, educational, story-led, and CTA-focused.
Give me caption options optimized for saves and shares, not just likes.
Rewrite this caption so it sounds more confident and creator-brand aligned.
promptsHooks: Give me 10 short hooks that stop the scroll for this topic.
Create opening lines for a talking-head video with a high-retention first 3 seconds.
Convert my current post idea into 3 stronger hook-first versions.
promptsAvatarVideo: Write a 30-second avatar video script with a strong hook and clear CTA.
Give me a talking-head script for this upload in a confident premium tone.
Create 3 short video script outlines I can film this week from one idea.
promptsPlanning: Build a weekly posting plan with platform-specific priorities for Instagram and TikTok.
Turn one upload into a repurposing plan: reel, story, carousel, and short script.
Create a content calendar for the next 14 days with themes, hooks, and CTA direction.
